audit_input.task_goal: make the quadruped ant move forward with a stable gait

audit_output.reason: The agent survived the entire episode and maintained a healthy pose, contributing significantly to the total reward via the alive_bonus. However, its forward velocity (mean 0.0765) and forward displacement (mean 0.0038) are extremely low, indicating it is not moving forward as required by the task goal. It is exploiting the alive_bonus by merely existing without achieving locomotion.
